Not applicable.
__________________________________________________
Information About Our Executive Officers
The following is a list of names, ages and backgrounds of our current executive officers:
[PERSON] was appointed PepsiCo’s Senior Vice President and [PERSON] in [DATE_TIME]. Ms. [PERSON] joined PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME] as Vice President and Assistant [PERSON]. Prior to joining PepsiCo, Ms. [PERSON] was Assistant [PERSON] at Altria Corporate Services from [DATE_TIME] to 2005 and, prior to that, a senior manager at Coopers & Lybrand.
[PERSON] was appointed Vice Chairman, PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME] and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME]. In addition to providing strategic financial leadership for PepsiCo, Mr. [PERSON]’s portfolio has included a variety of responsibilities, including leadership of the Company’s information technology function since [DATE_TIME], the Company’s global e-commerce business from [DATE_TIME], and the Quaker Foods North America division from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME]. He has also held a number of leadership roles throughout his PepsiCo career, serving as Executive Vice President, Global Operations from [DATE_TIME], President of Pepsi-Cola North America [DATE_TIME], Executive Vice President, Operations from [DATE_TIME], and Senior Vice President, Transformation from 2005 to [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, he served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of PepsiCo Beverages and Foods from [DATE_TIME] through [DATE_TIME], and as PepsiCo’s Senior Vice President of Mergers and Acquisitions in [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] joined PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME] as a Business Planner and held various finance positions until [DATE_TIME] when he left to join Merck & Co., Inc. as Vice President, Retail, a position which he held until he rejoined PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME]. Prior to joining PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME], Mr. [PERSON] was with General Electric Company in a variety of finance positions.
[PERSON] has served as PepsiCo’s Chief Executive Officer and a director on the Board since [DATE_TIME], and assumed the role of Chairman of the Board in [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] previously served as President of PepsiCo from [DATE_TIME]. Prior to serving as President, Mr. [PERSON] held a variety of positions of increasing responsibility in [LOCATION], including as Commercial Vice President of PepsiCo Europe from [DATE_TIME], PepsiCo Eastern Europe Region from 2008 to [DATE_TIME], President, Developing & Emerging Markets, PepsiCo Europe from [DATE_TIME], Chief Executive Officer, PepsiCo Europe in [DATE_TIME], and Chief Executive Officer, Europe Sub-Saharan Africa from [DATE_TIME] until [DATE_TIME]. [DATE_TIME], he was General Manager for Iberia Snacks and Juices, and from [DATE_TIME] to 2001 a General Manager for Greece Snacks. Prior to joining PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME] as a marketing vice president for Spain Snacks, Mr. [PERSON] worked for [PERSON], [LOCATION], where he worked in several international assignments in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION]. Mr. [PERSON] has served as a director of Visa Inc. since [DATE_TIME].
Silviu Popovici was appointed Chief Executive Officer, [LOCATION], effective [DATE_TIME]. Prior to this role, he served as Chief Executive Officer, Europe Sub-Saharan Africa in [DATE_TIME] and as President, Europe Sub-Saharan Africa from [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] previously served as President, [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and CIS (The Commonwealth of Independent States) from [DATE_TIME], and as President, PepsiCo [LOCATION] from [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] joined PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME] following PepsiCo’s acquisition of Wimm-Bill-Dann Foods OJSC (WBD) and served as General Manager, WBD Foods Division from [DATE_TIME] until [DATE_TIME]. Prior to the acquisition, Mr. [PERSON] held senior leadership roles at WBD, running its dairy business from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME] and its beverages business from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] was appointed Chief Executive Officer, [LOCATION], effective [DATE_TIME]. Previously, she served in various leadership positions at PepsiCo Mexico Foods, as President from [DATE_TIME], as Chief Operating Officer from [DATE_TIME] and as Vice President and General Manager from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME]. Prior to joining PepsiCo Mexico Foods, she held a variety of roles, including leadership positions in [LOCATION] in [LOCATION], as well as in Foods and Snacks in the [LOCATION] Southern Cone region comprising [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION]. Ms. [PERSON] joined PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME] following PepsiCo’s acquisition of the Quaker Oats Company. At Quaker, she held various roles of increasing responsibility from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME], including running the regional Quaker Foods and Gatorade businesses in [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION].
[PERSON] was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer, PepsiCo, in [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, Mr. [PERSON] served as Group HR Director of Vodafone Group Services Limited from [DATE_TIME], where he was responsible for the Vodafone Human Resource Management function, as well as health and safety, and property and real estate functions. Prior to joining Vodafone, Mr. [PERSON] was executive vice president, human resources for the global downstream division of Royal Dutch Shell Plc. Prior to that, he worked for PepsiCo for [DATE_TIME] in various international, senior human resources roles, including assignments in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION], where he was most recently responsible for the [LOCATION], [LOCATION] region for PepsiCo Foods International. Prior to that, he served for [DATE_TIME] at AT&T Inc. in Human Resources.
[PERSON] was appointed Chief Executive Officer, PepsiCo Beverages North America, effective [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, Mr. [PERSON] served as President and Chief Operating Officer, North America Beverages from [DATE_TIME], Chief Operating Officer, North America Beverages and President, Global Foodservice from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME], and President, Global Foodservice from [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] joined PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME], where he has worked in numerous domestic and international locations and in a variety of roles, including Senior Vice President of Frito-Lay North America’s [LOCATION] from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME], Vice President, Sales of PepsiCo [LOCATION] and [LOCATION] from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME], Region Vice President of Frito-Lay North America’s Mountain region from [DATE_TIME] to 2008, Region Vice President of Frito-Lay North America’s [LOCATION] region from [DATE_TIME] to 2005 and Region Vice President of Frito-Lay North America’s [LOCATION] region from [DATE_TIME] to 2002.
[PERSON] was appointed Chief Executive Officer, [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], effective [DATE_TIME]. Previously he served as Chief Executive Officer, Sub-Saharan Africa in [DATE_TIME] and as Executive Vice President, Global Categories and Franchise Management from [DATE_TIME]. Before that, he led the global Pepsi-Lipton Joint Venture as President from [DATE_TIME]. Prior to such role, Mr. [PERSON] served as PepsiCo’s Senior Vice President and General Manager, [LOCATION] from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME], as Senior Vice President and General Manager, Commercial, [LOCATION] from [DATE_TIME], as Senior Vice President and General Manager, [LOCATION] from [DATE_TIME], as Vice President, General Manager, [LOCATION] from [DATE_TIME] to 2005 and as Commercial Director, [LOCATION] for the snacks business from [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] joined PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME] as a business development manager.
[PERSON] was appointed Chief Executive Officer, PepsiCo Foods North America, effective [DATE_TIME]. Prior to this role, Mr. [PERSON] served in leadership positions for Frito-Lay’s [LOCATION] operations, as Senior Vice President, Commercial Sales and Chief Commercial Officer from [DATE_TIME] and as General Manager and Senior Vice President, East Division from [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, he served as General Manager and Senior Vice President, Customer Management for PepsiCo’s global Walmart business from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME], as Sales Senior Vice President, North American Nutrition from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME] and as Vice President, Sales, Central Division from [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] joined PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME] as a part of PepsiCo’s acquisition of the Quaker Oats Company, which he joined in [DATE_TIME] and has held leadership positions of increasing responsibility in sales and customer management.
[PERSON] has served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary, PepsiCo since [DATE_TIME] and will continue in that role until [DATE_TIME]. From [DATE_TIME] through [DATE_TIME], Mr. [PERSON] also oversaw PepsiCo’s Public Policy and Government Affairs department. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Deputy General Counsel for PepsiCo and General Counsel for [LOCATION] and Corporate in [DATE_TIME], as Senior Vice President, PepsiCo Deputy General Counsel, General Counsel, North America Beverages and Quaker Foods North America from [DATE_TIME], as Senior Vice President, PepsiCo Deputy General Counsel, General Counsel, PepsiCo America Beverages from [DATE_TIME], as Senior Vice President, PepsiCo Chief Compliance and Ethics Officer from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME], and as Senior Vice President, General Counsel, Pepsi Beverages Company from [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, he served [DATE_TIME] in the law department of The Pepsi Bottling Group, Inc. (PBG) and, prior to that, was a member of PepsiCo’s corporate law department from the time he joined PepsiCo in [DATE_TIME] until [DATE_TIME].
Executive officers are elected by our Board of Directors, and their terms of office continue until the next [DATE_TIME] meeting of the Board or until their successors are elected and have qualified. There are no family relationships among our executive officers.
PART II
Item 5.
